site.name: Ibiza Access
site.description: Design your perfect Ibiza trip. Villas, yachts, private jets, chefs and VIP experiences — all in one place.

home.heroTitle: Your Ibiza, exactly as you imagine it.
home.heroSubtitle: Design every detail of your trip — villas, yachts, private chefs, VIP tables — then send the request when ready. No back-and-forth.
home.headlineParagraph1: Crafted for those who prioritize access, discretion, and precision, our Concierge Ibiza services at Ibiza Access curates tailored stays for an international clientele seeking an elevated way to experience the island. Each journey is shaped around your intention, whether you wish to immerse yourself in Ibiza's vibrant, festive energy, reconnect with nature and stillness, or create meaningful moments with family and friends.
home.headlineParagraph2: From villas and hotels to yachts, transportation and fully tailored itineraries, each experience is planned with clarity, intention and over ten years of local expertise all year round. Early access, off-market opportunities and trusted partnerships ensure a seamless experience from beginning to end. Your pathway to paradise.

home.processStep1Body: Browse the services and add what you want to your itinerary. Villa, yachts, chef, VIP tables — everything in one place.
home.processStep2Body: Within 24h your dedicated concierge sends a detailed proposal with availability, locked-in prices and alternatives.
home.processStep3Body: You pay a deposit to confirm and we handle the rest. You arrive and everything is coordinated.

services.title: Services
services.intro1: Concierge in Ibiza is not simply about making reservations. It is about anticipating needs, simplifying logistics and creating a sense of ease from arrival to departure.
services.intro2: At Ibiza Access, our Ibiza concierge service adapts entirely to you — from sourcing the most suitable villas or hotels to last-minute arrangements, private transfers, yacht charters, wellness experiences and bespoke requests handled discreetly behind the scenes.
services.intro3: With over ten years of local presence, we operate through a trusted network of partners, granting access to services and opportunities not publicly available. Our team is based on the island year-round, ensuring responsiveness, reliability and continuity at all times.
services.intro4: This is Ibiza, curated around you —
services.coordinationCopy: Once you add this service to your trip, we confirm it based on your dates, guest count, and specific preferences. Your dedicated concierge handles all operational details.

trip.emptyHint: Add services from the catalog to build your itinerary.
trip.title: Your Ibiza trip
trip.estimateNotice: Total is estimated. Once confirmed we coordinate real availability and final pricing.

confirmation.title: Request received
confirmation.subtitle: We'll get back to you within 24h with the final proposal.

about.title: We've designed luxury Ibiza trips since 2018.
about.p1: We were born to solve what the premium client needs in Ibiza: a single point of contact, exclusive properties and experiences, and immediate answers. No middlemen, no empty promises.
about.p2: We work with a closed circle of off-market villas, yacht captains, star chefs and suppliers who passed strict vetting for years. If it's in our catalog, we've already tested it.
about.p3: Our team lives on the island year-round. We know which clubs are real and which sell smoke, which beach will be quiet on Tuesday and which villa has the best September sunrise.
